channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Israel cracks down on Palestinian citizens who speak out against the war in Gaza
item.description: UMM AL-FAHM, Israel (AP) — Israel’s yearlong crackdown against Palestinian citizens who speak out against the war in Gaza is prompting many to self-censor out of fear of being jailed and further marginalized in society, while some still find ways to dissent — carefully.
item.dc:creator: SAM MCNEIL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fred Harris, former US senator from Oklahoma and presidential hopeful, dies at 94
item.description: Fred Harris, a former U.S. senator from Oklahoma, presidential hopeful and populist who championed Democratic Party reforms in the turbulent 1960s, died Saturday. He was 94. Harris’ wife, Margaret Elliston, confirmed his death to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RIO YAMAT, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: A man called 911 for help during a home invasion. Las Vegas police fatally shot him
item.description: A man who was fatally shot by a Las Vegas police officer this month had called 911 for help during a home invasion.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hyundai, Kia recall over 200K electric cars over power issues
item.description: Hyundai’s recall encompasses over 145,000 cars, including some IONIQ 5 and IONIQ 6 EVs along with Genesis GV60, Genesis GV70 and Genesis G80 models.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Glen Powell to star in latest hit: a look-alike competition
item.description: After an appearance in "Top Gun: Maverick" and leading roles in "Anyone but You," "Hitman" and "Twisters," Austin native and Hollywood A-lister Glen Powell is set to star in his latest smash hit: A look-alike competition.
item.dc:creator: Kelsey Thompson, Fox 5

item.title: Here are the most heated Thanksgiving food fights
item.description: Thanksgiving dinner may be one of the most anticipated meals of the year for many people, but it is also one of the most debated. From the correct way to prepare the turkey to the best side dishes and desserts, here are the dishes worth fighting over this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NATO head and Trump meet in Florida for talks on global security
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — U.S. President-elect Donald Trump and the head of NATO have met for talks on global security, the military alliance said Saturday. In a brief statement, NATO said Trump and its secretary general, Mark Rutte, met on Friday in Palm Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Officer kills pet dog mistaken for coyote, owner says it was unnecessary
item.description: An animal control officer shot and killed a pet dog in a Massachusetts town after mistaking it for a coyote in an incident that has the animal's owner fuming, but that local police are describing as a sad mix-up.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Alabama carries out third nitrogen hypoxia execution in the country
item.description: Carey Dale Grayson, 50, fought his restraints and raised both middle fingers just before gas was administered, a witness said.
item.dc:creator: Asher Redd, WGN 9

item.title: Human smugglers convicted after Indian family freezes to death trying to illegally cross northern border
item.description: Two men have been convicted of charges related to human smuggling in connection with a family of Indian migrants who froze to death in 2022 trying to cross into the U.S. from Canada.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blue state to shutter over a dozen migrant shelters as Trump’s set to implement deportation agenda
item.description: New York will close 12 migrant shelters before the end of the year and weeks before President-elect Donald Trump takes office. The crisis is set to cost New York City around $12 billion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Voters rejected historic election reforms across the US, despite more than $100M push
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Two weeks before Election Day, activists from across the country gathered for an online rally heralding the historic number of state ballot initiatives seeking to change the way people vote.
item.dc:creator: DAVID A. LIEB, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Storm inundates Northern California with rain, heavy snow. Thousands remain in the dark in Seattle
item.description: HEALDSBURG, Calif. (AP) — Heavy downpours fell over much of Northern California on Friday, causing small landslides, overflowing a river and flooding some streets, including in parts of San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: NOAH BERGER and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado funeral home owners who let nearly 190 bodies decay plead guilty to corpse abuse
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (AP) — The owners of a Colorado funeral home who let nearly 190 bodies decay in a room-temperature building and gave grieving families fake ashes pleaded guilty on Friday to corpse abuse.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Louisiana lawmakers pass income and corporate tax cuts, raising statewide sales tax to pay for it
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Louisiana’s GOP-dominated legislature passed tax cuts on personal and corporate income on Friday in exchange for a statewide sales tax increase, giving Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Officer kills pet dog mistaken for a coyote in Massachusetts town. The owner says it was unnecessary
item.description: An animal control officer shot and killed a pet dog in a Massachusetts town after mistaking it for a coyote in an incident that has the animal's owner fuming, but that local police are describing as a sad mix-up.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 13 migrants rescued from remote, rugged area of Big Bend
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (Border Report) -- Smugglers abandoned 13 migrants in an "extremely" remote area of Big Bend National Park, U.S. Customs and Border Protections said. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fernie Ortiz, Fox 5

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, Fox 5

item.title: Amazon purchase leaves Las Vegas senior couple in refund limbo, company responds
item.description: “If this happened to me, it's had to have happened to other people,” says Las Vegas senior LaRae Obenauf.
item.dc:creator: James Schaeffer, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 2 convicted in human smuggling case after Indian family froze to death on US-Canada border
item.description: FERGUS FALLS, Minn. (AP) — A jury convicted two men on Friday of charges related to human smuggling for their roles in an international operation that led to the deaths of a family of Indian migrants who froze while trying to cross the Canada-U.S. border during a 2022 blizzard.
item.dc:creator: MARK VANCLEAVE and MICHAEL GOLDBERG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado funeral home owners plead guilty to corpse abuse after nearly 200 bodies found decomposing
item.description: Two funeral home owners in Colorado pleaded guilty to 191 counts of abuse of a corpse on Friday, a year after decaying bodies were found piled on top of each other.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teen suspect arrested after cheerleader found dead in woods
item.description: Tennessee cheerleader Savannah Copeland, 13, was allegedly stabbed to death by a 15-year-old after the pair met up around midnight Oct. 22.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazilian illegal immigrant wanted for drug trafficking arrested in Massachusetts sanctuary city
item.description: Federal immigration authorities appear to have stepped up arrests of illegal immigrant criminal suspects in Massachusetts in recent weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California case is the first confirmed bird flu infection in a US child
item.description: Health officials on Friday confirmed bird flu in a California child — the first reported case in a U.S. minor.
item.dc:creator: MIKE STOBBE and JONEL ALECCIA Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What to know about a Wisconsin man who faked his own death and fled to Eastern Europe
item.description: GREEN LAKE, Wis. (AP) — A Wisconsin man who faked his own drowning this summer and left his wife and three children has been located in Eastern Europe and is communicating with law enforcement, but he has not committed to returning home, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Suspect in Young Dolph case placed on a 6 year diversion
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. -- The alleged mastermind behind the killing of Memphis rapper Young Dolph and the man charged with accessory after the fact faced a judge Friday morning. Hernandez Govan is facing charges of attempted and first-degree murder plus conspiracy.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Clonazepam tablets recalled over 'life-threatening' label mistake
item.description: The company that produces the tablets has said the medication is mislabeled with the incorrect strength on the carton.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cases of 'walking pneumonia' are rising across the US: Here's where it's worst
item.description: In October, the CDC wrote that since late spring, the number of infections caused by walking pneumonia has been increasing, especially among young children.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Rousseau, KRON4

item.title: Trump chooses Pam Bondi for attorney general pick after Gaetz withdraws
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Thursday named Pam Bondi, the former attorney general of Florida, to be U.S. attorney general just hours after his other choice, Matt Gaetz, withdrew his name.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Alabama carries out nation’s third nitrogen gas execution on a man for a hitchhiker's killing
item.description: ATMORE, Ala. (AP) — An Alabama man convicted in the 1994 killing of a hitchhiker cursed at the prison warden and made obscene gestures with his hands shortly before he was put to death Thursday evening in the nation’s third execution using nitrogen gas.
item.dc:creator: KIM CHANDLER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Emperor penguin who swam to Australia released 20 days after waddling onto beach
item.description: The only emperor penguin known to have swum from Antarctica to Australia was released at sea 20 days after he waddled ashore on a popular tourist beach
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Canoeist is paddling the 6,000-mile Great Loop out of gratitude for life
item.description: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Peter Frank has paddled from Michigan's Upper Peninsula in June to the Chesapeake Bay in Maryland this month in his 1982 Sawyer Loon decked canoe, but he’s still got a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: Twitch star rants against Israel, calls for another 9/11
item.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Family of woman who went missing on cross-country vacation says cryptic texts sent from phone unlike her
item.description: Hannah Kobayashi never got on her flight from LA to NYC on Nov. 8 and disappeared in Los Angeles; new surveillance footage shows her with a mysterious man, her family says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 Utah children missing since 2022 found living with FLDS Church, returned to mother
item.description: Three Utah children missing for two years have been located living with members of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, according to the Fredonia Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Police report reveals assault allegations against Hegseth, Trump's pick for defense secretary
item.description: SANTA CRUZ, Calif. (AP) — A woman told police that she was sexually assaulted in 2017 by Pete Hegseth after he took her phone, blocked the door to a California hotel room and refused to let her leave, according to a detailed investigative report made public late Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA MENDOZA, BRIAN SLODYSKO and JULIET LINDERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4
